user_query: I want to organize a company event and include some entertaining records. Can you fetch the Guinness World Records related to 'push ups' and provide the details of the record with the most consecutive vertical push-ups? Also, recommend a random Quick Pick for Lotto America to add some fun to our event.

TaskList.description: Fetch Guinness World Records related to 'push ups'.
Extract the record with the most consecutive vertical push-ups from the fetched records.
Generate a random Quick Pick for Lotto America.
